targets.query: from(bucket: "crop_metrics") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "advisory" and r._field == "stress_level" and r._value == "severe_stress") |> count()
from(bucket: "crop_metrics") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "advisory" and r._field == "recommended_irrigation_mm") |> mean()
from(bucket: "crop_metrics") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "advisory" and r._field == "dominant_crop") |> group(columns: ["_value"]) |> count()
from(bucket: "crop_metrics") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "advisory" and r._field == "phenology_stage") |> group(columns: ["_value"]) |> count()
from(bucket: "crop_metrics") |> range(start: -7d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "advisory" and r._field == "stress_fraction") |> group(columns: ["field_id"])
from(bucket: "crop_metrics") |> range(start: -7d) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "advisory" and r._field == "recommended_irrigation_mm") |> group(columns: ["field_id"])
